title: EventPayload
description: Represents a single error event occurrence. Contains exception details, stack traces, application and device information, breadcrumbs, and custom metadata.

exceptions.description: The list of exceptions that occurred. The first exception is the most significant. Multiple exceptions can represent a causal chain.

breadcrumbs.description: A trail of events leading up to the error, useful for debugging the sequence of actions that caused the error.

request.description: Information about the HTTP request during which the error occurred, if applicable.

clientIp.description: The IP address of the client making the request.

httpMethod.description: The HTTP method used (GET, POST, etc.).

threads.description: Information about all running threads at the time of the error.

context.description: A string representing what was happening in the application at the time of the error, such as a controller action or route name.

groupingHash.description: A custom grouping hash to override the default error grouping behavior. Events with the same grouping hash will be grouped together.

unhandled.description: Whether this error was unhandled (true) or caught and handled (false) by the application.

severity.description: The severity level of the error.

severityReason.description: Information about why the severity was set to its current value.

type.description: The reason type for the severity assignment.

attributes.description: Additional attributes about the severity reason.

user.description: Information about the user who experienced the error.

id.description: A unique identifier for the user.

app.description: Information about the application in which the error occurred.

releaseStage.description: The release stage (e.g., production, staging, development).

dsymUUIDs.description: UUIDs for dSYM files used in symbolication.

duration.description: The time in milliseconds since the application started.

durationInForeground.description: The time in milliseconds the app has been in the foreground.

inForeground.description: Whether the app was in the foreground when the error occurred.

device.description: Information about the device on which the error occurred.

freeMemory.description: Free memory in bytes at the time of the error.

browserName.description: The browser name, for web applications.

jailbroken.description: Whether the device is jailbroken or rooted.

orientation.description: The device orientation at the time of the error.

time.description: The device's local time when the error occurred.

runtimeVersions.description: Runtime version information (e.g., node, clr, swift).

session.description: Session information for the current user session.

startedAt.description: The date and time the session started.

handled.description: The number of handled events in this session.

unhandled.description: The number of unhandled events in this session.

metaData.description: Custom metadata organized by tab name. Each key represents a tab that will appear on the Bugsnag dashboard, containing key-value pairs of additional debugging information.
